title: PolarPilot AssistantTask
description: Payload contract for PolarClaw → PolarPilot assistant task hand-off (delivered as LobsterEvent.payload with event.type = 'assistant_task').

fundamentalGoal.description: The root objective the assistant must accomplish; injected as the orchestrator prompt.

executionApproach.description: Strategy hint for how the goal should be tackled (e.g. 'shell', 'edit', 'mixed').

successCriteria.description: Statement evaluated against the agent output for graceful stop / success.

failureCriteria.description: Statement that, when matched, marks the task as failed.
